g.title: timeline_restart
g.text: walshadow restart timelines — 3 scenarios, time flows top → bottom within each column

g.title: cluster_a
g.text: A. clean restart (SIGTERM, saved restart point still available)

g.title: cluster_b
g.text: B. kill -9 mid-stream (last saved manifest authoritative)

g.title: cluster_c
g.text: C. extended outage (slot LSN beyond source wal_keep_size)

g.title: b1
g.text: memory lost; last complete manifest survives

g.title: b4
g.text: ⑤ shadow PG recovers on its own

g.title: b6
g.text: ⑦ resume source from saved point
resume shadow from its own progress
